title: Consultation on Proposed Stablecoin Issuance and Offering Module
summary: Consulted on the proposed SIO module and related appendices covering cyber security controls, incident reporting, whitepaper requirements, recovery plan indicators, financial penalties and definitions for stablecoin issuance and offering.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.blockchain_web3: Consultation that preceded Bahrain’s stablecoin framework.

notes: Related instruments: Produced the Stablecoin Issuance and Offering Module
